Class xLifeMain.MyActionListener

java.lang.Object
xLifeMain.MyActionListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActionListener, EventListener
Enclosing class:
xLifeMain
public static class xLifeMain.MyActionListener extends Object implements ActionListener
This is Nested classes MyActionListener For listening the action from the GUI

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MyActionListener(xLifeModel model, JFrame window, JLabel scoreLabel)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    actionPerformed(ActionEvent event)
    Base on the text from button, give the action for proper button "Animate": start and stop timmer "Stick": stop timer, update move , redraw the grid and update score "Timer": every 50s run timer 1 times, update move, update score, grid and check ending "Close": exit the simulation "Save": open Dialog for asking name of the output file, then save current map to file "Load Map": Load new file, update all object - window - grid - status "Reset" : Load current map again and reset all variable
    String
    geFile()
    Open FileDialog allow user can select map
    void
    saveMapDialog()
    Open FileDialog allow user set up output file name Call toString method of xLifeModel to get current map save the string to file
    void
    saveMapToFile(File file)
    Write file process
    void
    setTimer(Timer timer)
    This method use for animation button, every 50s run 1 times,
    void
    updateScore()
    Update score after all object moving Get points from grid

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • MyActionListener

      public MyActionListener(xLifeModel model, JFrame window, JLabel scoreLabel)
      Parameters:
      model - update grid when move change
      window - update window when change map
      scoreLabel - update scoreLabel for every move ( stick button + animate is running)

  • Method Details

    • setTimer

      public void setTimer(Timer timer)
      This method use for animation button, every 50s run 1 times,
      Parameters:
      timer - add timer to listener

    • actionPerformed

      public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent event)
      Base on the text from button, give the action for proper button "Animate": start and stop timmer "Stick": stop timer, update move , redraw the grid and update score "Timer": every 50s run timer 1 times, update move, update score, grid and check ending "Close": exit the simulation "Save": open Dialog for asking name of the output file, then save current map to file "Load Map": Load new file, update all object - window - grid - status "Reset" : Load current map again and reset all variable
      Specified by:
      actionPerformed in interface ActionListener
      Parameters:
      event - the event the listener get

    • updateScore

      public void updateScore()
      Update score after all object moving Get points from grid

    • geFile

      public String geFile()
      Open FileDialog allow user can select map
      Returns:
      path of file select from FileDialog

    • saveMapDialog

      public void saveMapDialog() throws IOException
      Open FileDialog allow user set up output file name Call toString method of xLifeModel to get current map save the string to file
      Throws:
      IOException

    • saveMapToFile

      public void saveMapToFile(File file) throws IOException
      Write file process
      Parameters:
      file -
      Throws:
      IOException
